_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Communication involves conveying information using the most effective medium and language for the audience.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in communicating research findings to both technical and non-technical audiences, including paper writing, conference presentation, and internal briefing formats.
comments: DDaT skill intersects with WIDAI LS domain. LS-S-005 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DG-S-001 (DG, cosine: 0.454), RC-A-003 (RC, cosine: 0.406).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.0/10 (raw 0.599). No substantive shared vocabulary — relationship is purely semantic. DDaT-only terms [audience, communication, conveying, effective, information, involves] vs WIDAI-only terms [audiences, briefing, communicating, conference, findings, formats] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.867 (P=0.880, R=0.855). P exceeds R by 0.025 — the DDaT element's 14 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 20 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DDaT element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Communication involves conveying information using the most effective medium and" and "Skill in communicating research findings to both technical and non-technical aud" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.513 < STS 0.599 (gap -0.086). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [audience, communication, conveying] and [audiences, briefing, communicating] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 3.2%. Zero substantive shared tokens. The entire relationship is semantic — no lexical trace. DDaT terms: [audience, communication, conveying, effective, information, involves]. WIDAI terms: [audiences, briefing, communicating, conference, findings, formats].
